title: selaginella rolandi-principis
intro: Selaginella rolandi-principis, also known as the 'Princess Feather' or 'Princess Flower', is a type of resurrection fern, a small, delicate plant that thrives in shaded and humid environments. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to promote overall health and well-being, with benefits including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. It is typically used in teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often recommended for its potential to boost the body's natural defense mechanisms and promote a sense of calm and relaxation.
